basic_details.job_title: Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Anna University Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 12 May 2026 on the official website of Anna University. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 05-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Assistant position at Anna University?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Project Assistant post at Anna University is 05-06-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Project Assistant position is a B.E. in ECE (Electronics and Communication Engineering) or any relevant domain.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000 per month for a period of 3 years.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant post as per the official notification released by Anna University.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant role will involve shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is MIT/EE/CMRG2025-26/CMRG251257/Project Assistant/01.

faq.question: Q9. Which city and state is this job located in?
faq.answer: This job is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is contractual.
